title: No XP
description: Completely disables the experience mechanic from the game
body:
This mod completely disables the experience mechanic from the game.

Useful if you feel that the XP mechanic is too grindy and you'd rather just loot structures for enchantments.

Changes done by this mod:
- XP orbs will not spawn, effectively preventing you from gaining levels of xp.
- The XP bar will not appear on your screen by default.
- All other bars will be lowered, just like before XP was added to the game.
- Anvils will no longer require XP to repair, enchant, and rename tools.



<details>
<summary>Config Summary</summary>
  
Configs are found in the `no_xp` folder inside the main config folder.

`enable_xp_bar`
---
Allows you to enable the GUI XP bar if set to `true`.

_This value must either be `true` or `false`_

</details>

Notes:
- Enchanting tables are still accessible, though you will not be able to gain new levels to use them
- The accessibility of Mending has not been changed. You would need to install other mods that either removes Mending or changes its functionality to not require XP.
- Loot tables have not been modified. It is recommended to install other mods to increase the likelihood of getting enchanted loot.


---
**You may freely use this mod in any modpack, as long as the download remains hosted within the Modrinth ecosystem.**

**You may also freely port this mod to a different version/modloader, as long as you reference the original mod and it is hosted within the Modrith ecosystem**
